title: Educating Clients on Platform Access
content:
Overview


Clients access the platform through different login paths depending on their account type. When a client is confused about how to log in, agents should first identify whether they are a B2C Premium user or a School user, then walk them through the correct path.



B2C Premium Login Path


Individual subscribers follow these steps:


  1. Go to tklesson.com
  2. Click Premium Self-Study
  3. Click Already Subscribed? Log In
  4. Enter email address and password
  5. If 2FA is enabled, enter the 6-digit code from their authenticator app
  6. After successful authentication, they land on the Premium Dashboard

Common confusion points:


  • Can't find the login page: The login is accessed via the Premium page, not the main homepage. Walk them to tklesson.com → Premium Self-Study → Already Subscribed? Log In.
  • Forgot password: The login screen has a "Forgot password?" link that sends a reset email.
  • 2FA issues: If they can't access their authenticator app, there is a "Use a recovery code instead" option. If recovery codes are also lost, refer to the Disabling 2FA article.


School Portal Login Path


School admins, teachers, and students all use the same School Login page:


  1. Go to tklesson.com
  2. Click School Login
  3. Enter School ID, email address, and password
  4. If 2FA is enabled, enter the 6-digit code from their authenticator app
  5. The system determines their role (admin, teacher, or student) and shows the appropriate dashboard

Common confusion points:


  • Don't know their School ID: This is provided by the school admin during onboarding. The client should contact their school admin. Agents can also look it up via User Lookup if the email is in the system.
  • Personal premium account vs. school account: These are separate. If they have both, they must use the correct login page for each — Premium Self-Study for personal, School Login for school access.
  • All roles use the same login page: The School Login page is identical for admins, teachers, and students. The system routes them after authentication based on their role.


Key Talking Points for Agents


  • "Let me walk you through exactly where to click. Tell me what you see on your screen right now."
  • "That login page is just one step away — let me show you the path."
  • "Now that you know where to go, you'll be able to log in on your own next time."
